title: Clothing System
description: Surviving the outer rim requires warm clothes. Players must acquire or craft clothing from available materials (animal pelts, wool). Clothing affects survival in cold/harsh conditions and may have durability.
definition-of-done: Clothing items can be crafted or acquired. Clothing provides warmth stat. Cold exposure without adequate clothing causes negative effects.
testing-plan: Verify clothing crafting works with correct materials. Test warmth effects on survival. Verify cold exposure penalties apply correctly.
